entry.title: IDC W52P1J09G0001 (P00010) awarded to AMERICAN ORDNANCE LLC, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: ADMINISTRATIVE MODIFICATION INTENDED TO CLARIFY PAYMENT TERMS.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC W52P1J09G0001 (P00011) awarded to AMERICAN ORDNANCE LLC, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE
